# plot_montage { #neuroim.plot_montage }

```python
plot_montage(
    vol,
    axis=2,
    n_slices=16,
    cmap='gray',
    ncols=4,
    title=None,
    figsize=None,
    axes=None,
)
```

Show multiple evenly-spaced slices along *axis* in a grid.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                                     | Description                                                 | Default    |
|----------|------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| vol      | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | 3-D volume array.                                           | _required_ |
| axis     | [int](`int`)                             | Axis along which to slice (0, 1, or 2).  Default 2 (axial). | `2`        |
| n_slices | [int](`int`)                             | Number of slices to display.                                | `16`       |
| cmap     | [str](`str`)                             | Colormap name.                                              | `'gray'`   |
| ncols    | [int](`int`)                             | Number of columns in the grid.                              | `4`        |
| title    | [str](`str`)                             | Super-title for the figure.                                 | `None`     |
| figsize  | [tuple](`tuple`)                         | Figure size.  If *None* it is computed automatically.       | `None`     |
| axes     | array-like of Axes                       | Pre-existing axes (must have at least *n_slices* elements). | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                | Description   |
|--------|---------------------|---------------|
|        | (fig, axes) : tuple |               |
